data.name: SmartVellore
data.description: A full-stack civic issue reporting platform for potholes, garbage, water leakage, and public hazards with an interactive map interface.

data.name: Lane.AI
data.description: A computer vision lane-detection system that identifies and tracks road lanes in images and videos for real-time assistance.

data.name: Karaoke.AI
data.description: An intelligent karaoke companion that syncs lyrics, detects pitch in real time, and provides live feedback to singers.
